##: Scoop manifest skeleton for Terminal Commander (per-user, no-admin install).
Scoop installs into the current user's profile (~/scoop) with NO elevation,
which matches Terminal Commander's user-space-only model exactly.
PLACEHOLDERS: version / url / hash below are placeholders. Publishing this
manifest is a SEPARATE follow-up that needs (a) a GitHub-release zip asset
terminal-commanderd.exe) at the templated URL, and (b) a Scoop bucket repo
to host this manifest. Wiring the release-zip CI asset + bucket is tracked
as a follow-up CI/infra task; this file is the manifest skeleton only.
When the release zip lands, replace VERSION_PLACEHOLDER and compute the
SHA256 of the asset (Scoop verifies it on install). 'autoupdate' lets
'scoop update' pick up new tags automatically once the bucket is live.
description: Local MCP-operated terminal/file signal channel (native Windows binaries).
notes: Terminal Commander is installed per-user with no admin rights.
Configure your MCP client with: terminal-commander setup harness
